news.title: World Biohack Summit 2025 Returns for Record Third Edition in Dubai
news.summary: The third edition brought together biohackers, scientists and entrepreneurs from 30+ countries at JW Marriott Marina. Themes included genomics, AI-driven health optimisation, and ancient wellness wisdom meeting modern science.

news.title: Kayan Wellness Festival Awarded Best Festival in the Middle East 2025
news.summary: Over 11,500 visitors gathered on Fahid Island for the inaugural edition featuring Sadhguru, Gary Brecka, Mo Gawdat, and Marisa Peer. The 2026 edition expanded to 15,000+ visitors with 60+ sessions.

news.title: Abu Dhabi Launches Future Health — Transforming Global Healthcare Week Into Year-Round Platform
news.summary: The Department of Health Abu Dhabi launched Future Health as a continuous global ecosystem. The initiative has convened 500+ speakers from nearly 100 countries and launched the world's first Declaration on Longevity and Precision Medicine.

news.title: Future Health and MIT Solve Launch $300K Challenge for Anticipatory Health Systems
news.summary: Future Health partnered with MIT Solve to launch a global challenge seeking innovations in population health sensing. Three winning teams will share $300,000 and pitch live at the April summit.

news.title: WHX Dubai 2026: Arab Health Rebrands as World Health Expo
news.summary: After 50 years as Arab Health, the event evolved into World Health Expo with a new venue at Dubai Exhibition Centre. The 2026 edition hosted 4,800+ exhibitors and 270,000+ professionals from 180+ countries.

news.title: Dubai Fitness Challenge 2025 Smashes Records with 3M+ Participants
news.summary: The ninth edition saw record-breaking numbers with 40,327 cyclists, 307,000+ runners, and over 3 million total participants. The landmark tenth edition is confirmed for 2026.

news.title: Peak Longevity Fest Debuts in Dubai with Focus on Four Pillars of Health
news.summary: A new two-day event brought together biohacking seekers and wellness enthusiasts for workshops on skincare-hormones, stem cell science, brain rewiring for longevity, and blood cleansing protocols.

news.title: The New Frontier in Longevity: Senolytics and Age-Reversal Therapies Show Promise
news.summary: Unity Biotechnology reported encouraging Phase 2b results for its senolytic drug UBX1325, while the combination of dasatinib and quercetin continues to show results across 70+ age-related conditions. The global anti-aging market surpassed $85 billion in 2025.

news.title: UAE Wellness Economy Now Worth $40.8 Billion, Reports Global Wellness Institute
news.summary: A new report reveals the UAE's wellness economy has reached $40.8 billion, driven by wellness tourism growing at 23.5% annually. Wellness travelers in the GCC now spend 35–40% more per trip than average tourists, making it one of the most lucrative tourism segments.

news.title: Scientists Reveal How Breathwork Unlocks Psychedelic-Like States in the Brain
news.summary: Landmark research published in Nature found that circular breathwork induces altered states of consciousness similar to psychedelics, predicted by decreases in CO2 saturation. Despite reducing overall brain blood flow, breathwork increased flow to emotion-processing regions, improving well-being and reducing depressive symptoms.

news.title: Biohacking Market Set to Surge from $24.5B to $111.3B by 2034
news.summary: A new market report projects the global biohacking industry will reach $111.3 billion by 2034, driven by preventive healthcare adoption, wearable technology advances, and growing consumer interest in health optimization and longevity protocols.

news.title: XLR8 Wellness Unveils 2026 Blueprint to Redefine Dubai's Longevity Economy
news.summary: XLR8 Wellness announced a strategic plan focused on the 'Uberization' of biohacking — democratizing longevity through a tech-enabled platform offering on-demand NAD+ therapy, genetic screening, and performance diagnostics across Dubai.

news.title: Google Unveils Next-Gen Healthcare AI Tools at I/O 2025
news.summary: At Google I/O 2025, Google unveiled Gemini-based healthcare AI models for radiology and workflow automation, plus AI assistants supporting real-time clinical decision-making. The global AI healthcare market is projected to reach $45.2 billion by 2026.

news.title: Stanford Develops CRISPR-GPT: An AI Copilot for Gene-Editing Experiments
news.summary: Stanford researchers created CRISPR-GPT, an AI tool that generates experiment designs, suggests guide RNA sequences, and forecasts problems in gene-editing research — streamlining work that typically takes months into days.

news.title: Global Wellness Summit Releases 10 Wellness Trends for 2026
news.summary: The annual trends report highlights the rise of 'active wearables' (wearables 3.0) that intervene rather than just track, longevity residences with built-in health optimization, AI-driven hyper-personalized wellness coaching, and digital detox retreats as mainstream wellness offerings.

news.title: Longevity, Biohacking & the Rise of Wellness Residences in the UAE
news.summary: A new category of luxury property is emerging in the UAE: wellness residences with built-in preventive medicine, advanced diagnostics, biohacking facilities, and AI-driven personalization embedded directly into daily living spaces.

news.title: CES 2026: The Fitness & Wellness Tech Trends You Need to Know
news.summary: CES 2026 showcased next-generation fitness and wellness technology including continuous biomarker monitors, AI-powered recovery devices, smart cold plunge systems, and wearables that actively guide sleep timing and workout intensity in real-time.

news.title: 26 Longevity Trends That Will Define 2026
news.summary: From SGLT2 inhibitors being repurposed as anti-aging drugs to continuous hormone monitors, peptide therapy protocols, and AI longevity coaches — a comprehensive look at the science and technology pushing human healthspan forward in 2026.

news.title: UAE's New Strategy Develops Market for Healthy Ageing Solutions
news.summary: The UAE government unveiled a national healthy ageing strategy, positioning the country as a pioneer in longevity and precision medicine. The GCC longevity market is valued between $9–13 billion, with the UAE contributing over $4–6 billion.

news.title: Top Biohacking Gadgets for Wellness and Longevity in 2025
news.summary: From red light therapy panels and portable PEMF devices to advanced sleep trackers and at-home blood biomarker kits — the latest gadgets making clinical-grade biohacking accessible for home use.

news.title: 9 Anti-Aging and Longevity Startups to Watch in 2026
news.summary: A curated look at the most promising longevity startups, including companies working on senolytic drugs, epigenetic reprogramming, blood-based aging biomarkers, and AI-driven drug discovery platforms targeting age-related diseases.

news.title: New Year, New You: 11 of Dubai's Best Wellness Centres for a 2026 Reset
news.summary: Grazia's guide to the top wellness destinations in Dubai for 2026, featuring longevity clinics, cryotherapy studios, float therapy centers, and holistic healing spaces that are defining the city's booming wellness scene.
